global_brief: DeepSeek 发布 V4 预览版，性能接近前沿模型但价格低廉，同时 OpenAI 推出 GPT-5.5，AI 模型竞争白热化。Google 宣布向 Anthropic 投资高达 400 亿美元，延续科技巨头对 AI 算力的军备竞赛。多项研究聚焦 LLM 推理效率、量化失败模式及多轮对话可靠性，社区侧则涌现大量 AI Agent 工具与开源项目。

highlight_facts.title: Google will invest as much as $40 billion in Anthropic
highlight_facts.summary: Google will invest as much as $40 billion in Anthropic；This follows a similar, but smaller, investment by Amazon just days ago.
